message:
fix(gitlab): resolve hardcoded work item type ID and O(n) milestone scan

- Query Task work item type ID dynamically via GraphQL instead of
  hardcoding gid://gitlab/WorkItems::Type/5 (varies by GitLab instance).
  Result is cached per session with fallback for older GitLab versions.
- Add FetchMilestoneByIID using the iids[] API parameter to fetch a
  single milestone directly, replacing the O(n) FetchMilestones scan
  in findParentEpicMilestone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
